title: hieracium patens subsp. hecatadenum
intro: Hieracium patens subsp. hecatadenum, commonly known as the hawkweed or Hieracium hecatandrum, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Hieracium patens subsp. hecatadenum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for topical application, and its herbal preparations are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
